_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Notify designated mission leadership or applicable team members of any suspected cyber incident.
reference_document_element_description: Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance threshold definitions, drift detection protocols, incident reporting procedures, and remediation timelines.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.409), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.375).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.0/10 (raw 0.197). Shared vocabulary: [incident]. DCWF-only terms [applicable, cyber, designated, leadership, members, mission] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.855, R=0.849). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.2%). "Notify designated mission leadership or applicable team members of any suspected" and "Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance thresho" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.431 > STS 0.197 (gap +0.234). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [incident] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.2%. Shared tokens: [incident]. DCWF-only: [applicable, cyber, designated, leadership, members, mission]. WIDAI-only: [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.234 with low STS 0.197. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
